data.description: Explore Prcuisa's portfolio of AI automation, business systems, and smart technology installations. See our successful projects for startups, restaurants, offices, and creators.
data.html:
<html lang="id" class="light"><head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

    <!-- SEO Title & Description -->
    <title>Portfolio | Prcuisa - AI • Automation • Smart Systems Projects</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Explore Prcuisa's portfolio of AI automation, business systems, and smart technology installations. See our successful projects for startups, restaurants, offices, and creators.">
    <meta name="keywords" content="portfolio, AI projects, automation case studies, smart office installation, web app development, Prcuisa projects">

    <link rel="canonical" href="https://prcuisa.com/portfolio">
    <meta property="og:title" content="Prcuisa Portfolio - AI & Smart Tech Projects">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Real projects, real results. See how we transform businesses with AI and smart technology.">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://prcuisa.com/og-portfolio.jpg">
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://prcuisa.com/portfolio">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">

    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
    <meta name="twitter:title" content="Prcuisa Portfolio - AI • Automation • Smart Systems">
    <meta name="twitter:description" content="Explore our successful technology projects and case studies.">

    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/logodark.png">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: 'class',
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    fontFamily: {
                        'inter': ['Inter', 'sans-serif'],
                        'display': ['Space Grotesk', 'sans-serif'],
                    },
                    colors: {
                        primary: {
                            50: '#e6f7f9',
                            100: '#c0ebf0',
                            200: '#96dee7',
                            300: '#66d1dd',
                            400: '#3cc6d5',
                            500: '#009AA5',
                            600: '#008a94',
                            700: '#007780',
                            800: '#00656d',
                            900: '#00464d',
                        },
                        accent: {
                            400: '#38bdf8',
                            500: '#0ea5e9',
                            600: '#0284c7',
                        }
                    },
                    animation: {
                        'float': 'float 6s ease-in-out infinite',
                        'float-reverse': 'float-reverse 8s ease-in-out infinite',
                        'spin-slow': 'spin 20s linear infinite',
                        'pulse-slow': 'pulse 4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite',
                        'glow': 'glow 2s ease-in-out infinite alternate',
                        'slide-up': 'slideUp 0.6s ease-out',
                        'scale-in': 'scaleIn 0.5s ease-out',
                        'shimmer': 'shimmer 3s ease infinite',
                    },
                    keyframes: {
                        float: {
                            '0%,100%': { transform: 'translateY(0)' },
                            '50%': { transform: 'translateY(-20px)' }
                        },
                        'float-reverse': {
                            '0%,100%': { transform: 'translateY(0)' },
                            '50%': { transform: 'translateY(20px)' }
                        },
                        glow: {
                            '0%': { boxShadow: '0 0 20px rgba(0, 154, 165, 0.3)' },
                            '100%': { boxShadow: '0 0 50px rgba(0, 154, 165, 0.6)' },
                        },
                        shimmer: {
                            '0%': { backgroundPosition: '-200% 0' },
                            '100%': { backgroundPosition: '200% 0' },
                        },
                        slideUp: {
                            '0%': { opacity: '0', transform: 'translateY(30px)' },
                            '100%': { opacity: '1', transform: 'translateY(0)' },
                        },
                        scaleIn: {
                            '0%': { opacity: '0', transform: 'scale(0.9)' },
                            '100%': { opacity: '1', transform: 'scale(1)' },
                        },
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    <style>
        .gradient-text {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #009AA5 0%, #0ea5e9 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            background-clip: text;
            color: transparent;
            background-size: 200% auto;
        }
        
        .glass-nav {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        }
        
        .dark .glass-nav {
            background: rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.8);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        }
        
        .card-hover {
            transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1);
        }
        
        .card-hover:hover {
            transform: translateY(-8px);
        }
        
        .blob-bg {
            position: absolute;
            width: 400px;
            height: 400px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            filter: blur(80px);
            opacity: 0.15;
            z-index: -1;
        }
        
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #f1f1f1;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #009AA5;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        .dark ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #1f2937;
        }
        
        .logo-img {
            transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
        }
        .logo-light { display: block; }
        .logo-dark { display: none; }
        .dark .logo-light { display: none; }
        .dark .logo-dark { display: block; }
        
        .logo-text {
            width: 120px;
            height: 32px;
            background-image: url('/PRCUISAA.png');
            background-size: contain;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
            background-position: center;
            display: inline-block;
        }
        .dark .logo-text {
            filter: brightness(0) invert(1);
        }
        
        .filter-btn.active {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #009AA5, #0ea5e9);
            color: white;
        }
        
        .project-overlay {
            background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 100%);
        }
        
        @keyframes float-button {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
        }
        
        .float-animation {
            animation: float-button 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        
        .stat-number {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #009AA5, #0ea5e9);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            background-clip: text;
            color: transparent;
        }
    </style>

    <script>
        // Dark mode toggle
        const html = document.documentElement;
        const themeBtn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
        const mobileThemeBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-theme-toggle');
        
        html.classList.remove('dark');
        localStorage.setItem('theme', 'light');
        
        function toggleTheme() {
            if (html.classList.contains('dark')) {
                html.classList.remove('dark');
                localStorage.setItem('theme', 'light');
                updateThemeIcons();
            } else {
                html.classList.add('dark');
                localStorage.setItem('theme', 'dark');
                updateThemeIcons();
            }
        }
        
        function updateThemeIcons() {
            const isDark = html.classList.contains('dark');
            if (themeBtn) {
                const sunIcon = themeBtn.querySelector('.fa-sun');
                const moonIcon = themeBtn.querySelector('.fa-moon');
                if (isDark) {
                    sunIcon?.classList.add('hidden');
                    moonIcon?.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    sunIcon?.classList.remove('hidden');
                    moonIcon?.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            }
            if (mobileThemeBtn) {
                const mobileSunIcon = mobileThemeBtn.querySelector('.fa-sun');
                const mobileMoonIcon = mobileThemeBtn.querySelector('.fa-moon');
                if (isDark) {
                    mobileSunIcon?.classList.add('hidden');
                    mobileMoonIcon?.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    mobileSunIcon?.classList.remove('hidden');
                    mobileMoonIcon?.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            }
        }
        
        if(themeBtn) themeBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleTheme);
        if(mobileThemeBtn) mobileThemeBtn.addEventListener('click', toggleTheme);
        updateThemeIcons();
        
        // Mobile menu
        document.getElementById('mobile-menu-btn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
            document.getElementById('mobile-menu')?.classList.toggle('hidden');
        });
        
        document.querySelectorAll('#mobile-menu a').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', () => {
                document.getElementById('mobile-menu')?.classList.add('hidden');
            });
        });
        
        // Portfolio Filter
        const filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn');
        const portfolioItems = document.querySelectorAll('.portfolio-item');
        
        filterBtns.forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                filterBtns.forEach(b => {
                    b.classList.remove('active', 'bg-gradient-to-r', 'from-primary-500', 'to-accent-500', 'text-white');
                    b.classList.add('bg-gray-100', 'dark:bg-gray-800', 'text-gray-700', 'dark:text-gray-300');
                });
                btn.classList.remove('bg-gray-100', 'dark:bg-gray-800', 'text-gray-700', 'dark:text-gray-300');
                btn.classList.add('active', 'bg-gradient-to-r', 'from-primary-500', 'to-accent-500', 'text-white');
                
                const filter = btn.getAttribute('data-filter');
                
                portfolioItems.forEach(item => {
                    if (filter === 'all' || item.getAttribute('data-category') === filter) {
                        item.style.display = 'block';
                    } else {
                        item.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                });
            });
        });
        
        // Modal functionality
        const modal = document.getElementById('project-modal');
        const modalContent = document.getElementById('modal-content');
        const closeModal = document.getElementById('close-modal');
        const modalOverlay = document.getElementById('modal-overlay');
        
        const projectDetails = {
            'QR Code Generator System': {
                title: 'QR Code Generator System',
                client: 'SaaS Platform',
                duration: '3 months',
                year: '2024',
                description: 'A comprehensive self-service QR code platform that allows businesses to create, customize, and track dynamic QR codes. Features include bulk generation, analytics dashboard, custom branding, and API access.',
                challenge: 'The client needed a scalable solution that could handle thousands of QR code generations daily with real-time analytics tracking.',
                solution: 'We built a microservices architecture using React for the frontend, Node.js for the API, AWS S3 for asset storage, and MongoDB for flexible data storage. Implemented Redis caching for high-performance QR code delivery.',
                results: ['5,000+ active users in first 3 months', '99.9% uptime', 'Average 50ms QR code generation time', '30% month-over-month growth'],
                image: 'qrcode'
            },
            'AI Sales Assistant for Retail': {
                title: 'AI Sales Assistant for Retail',
                client: 'TechStyle Store',
                duration: '2 months',
                year: '2024',
                description: 'An intelligent WhatsApp-based assistant that handles product inquiries, provides recommendations, processes orders, and follows up with customers automatically.',
                challenge: 'The retail client was overwhelmed with WhatsApp inquiries and couldn\'t respond quickly enough, losing potential sales.',
                solution: 'We integrated OpenAI\'s GPT API with WhatsApp Business API, built a product knowledge base, and created automated workflows for order processing and follow-ups.',
                results: ['65% faster response time', '40% increase in sales conversions', '24/7 customer support coverage', '80% reduction in manual responses'],
                image: 'ai-sales'
            },
            'Smart Office Installation': {
                title: 'Smart Office Installation',
                client: 'Creativo Agency',
                duration: '2 weeks',
                year: '2024',
                description: 'Complete IoT and smart technology installation for a creative agency office including automated lighting, climate control, security systems, and centralized dashboard.',
                challenge: 'The agency wanted to modernize their office with smart technology while ensuring all systems worked seamlessly together and were easy to manage.',
                solution: 'We installed Ubiquiti network infrastructure, smart sensors throughout the office, automated lighting zones, and built a custom Home Assistant dashboard for centralized control.',
                results: ['30% reduction in energy costs', 'Improved employee comfort and productivity', 'Centralized control of all office systems', 'Automated security and access control'],
                image: 'smart-office'
            }
        };
        
        document.querySelectorAll('.view-project').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const card = e.target.closest('.portfolio-item');
                const title = card.querySelector('h3').textContent;
                const details = projectDetails[title] || {
                    title: title,
                    client: 'Client',
                    duration: 'N/A',
                    year: '2025',
                    description: 'Detailed project information coming soon.',
                    challenge: 'Information coming soon.',
                    solution: 'Information coming soon.',
                    results: ['Information coming soon.'],
                    image: 'default'
                };
                
                modalContent.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="space-y-6">
                        <div class="h-56 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-primary-400 to-accent-500 flex items-center justify-center">
                            <i class="fas fa-${details.image === 'qrcode' ? 'qrcode' : details.image === 'ai-sales' ? 'comment-dots' : details.image === 'smart-office' ? 'microchip' : 'folder'} text-white text-6xl"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h2 class="text-3xl font-bold">${details.title}</h2>
                            <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-4 mt-3 text-sm text-gray-500">
                                <span><i class="fas fa-building mr-1"></i> ${details.client}</span>
                                <span><i class="fas fa-clock mr-1"></i> ${details.duration}</span>
                                <span><i class="fas fa-calendar mr-1"></i> ${details.year}</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-2">Overview</h4>
                            <p class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">${details.description}</p>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-2">Challenge</h4>
                            <p class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">${details.challenge}</p>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-2">Solution</h4>
                            <p class="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">${details.solution}</p>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-2">Key Results</h4>
                            <ul class="space-y-2">
                                ${details.results.map(r => `<li class="flex items-center"><i class="fas fa-check-circle text-green-500 mr-2"></i>${r}</li>`).join('')}
                            </ul>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
                
                modal.classList.remove('hidden');
                document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
            });
        });
        
        function closeModalFunc() {
            modal.classList.add('hidden');
            document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
        }
        
        closeModal?.addEventListener('click', closeModalFunc);
        modalOverlay?.addEventListener('click', closeModalFunc);
        
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Escape' && !modal.classList.contains('hidden')) {
                closeModalFunc();
            }
        });
        
        // Smooth scroll
        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="/#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                const href = this.getAttribute('href');
                if (href.startsWith('/#') && window.location.pathname === '/') {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    const target = document.querySelector(href.substring(1));
                    if (target) target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
                }
            });
        });
    </script>

</body></html>
